task_raw.name: Reduce API tail latency

task_raw.name: Database query plan optimization
task_raw.description: Automate index suggestions and join reorderings using EXPLAIN plans and workload heatmaps to increase QPS.

task_raw.name: JVM GC tuning for microservices
task_raw.description: Tune heap, GC algorithm (G1/ZGC), and pause targets; track allocation hotspots to reduce stop-the-world pauses.

task_raw.name: gRPC throughput improvement
task_raw.description: Batch, compress, and pipeline RPCs; adjust flow control and thread pools to raise sustained RPS.

task_raw.name: Python numeric kernel acceleration
task_raw.description: Fuse vectorized operations with Numba/CuPy/Polars; eliminate Python loops and copy overhead for large arrays.

task_raw.name: Service autoscaling efficiency
task_raw.description: Right-size HPA/VPA targets using load/latency curves and binpacking to cut cost while keeping SLOs.

task_raw.name: eBPF flamegraph for syscall hotspots
task_raw.description: Capture on-CPU/off-CPU flamegraphs with eBPF/BCC to expose kernel and I/O bottlenecks.

task_raw.name: CDN cache hit optimization
task_raw.description: Analyze TTLs, vary headers, and compression; pre-warm hot objects to shrink origin load and TTFB.

task_raw.name: TensorRT/ONNX runtime speedups
task_raw.description: Apply graph fusion, quantization, and dynamic batching to improve model inference throughput per GPU.

task_raw.name: Rust rewrite of critical path
task_raw.description: Port a performance-critical module to Rust; exploit zero-cost abstractions and async executors for latency gains.

task_raw.name: Spark shuffle and skew mitigation
task_raw.description: Adaptive partitioning and broadcast joins; tune shuffle service and file formats for faster jobs.

task_raw.name: Kafka consumer lag reduction
task_raw.description: Tune max.poll, parallelism, and batching; optimize deserialization hotspot and commit strategy.

task_raw.name: PostgreSQL vacuum/autoanalyze tuning
task_raw.description: Optimize autovacuum thresholds, bloat cleanup, and statistics targets for stable performance.

task_raw.name: Vector DB ANN performance
task_raw.description: Benchmark FAISS/Qdrant/Weaviate indexes, tune nprobe/efSearch and memory layout for recall vs. speed.

task_raw.name: C++ memory allocator swap
task_raw.description: Replace default allocator with jemalloc/mimalloc; profile fragmentation and contention under load.

task_raw.name: Front-end bundle size reduction
task_raw.description: Tree-shake, code-split, and compress assets; monitor CLS/LCP/TTI to improve user experience.

task_raw.name: GPU training throughput
task_raw.description: Use mixed precision, gradient accumulation, and fused kernels; overlap compute and communication.

task_raw.name: Go goroutine leak and contention
task_raw.description: Find goroutine leaks and lock contention; adjust worker pools and channel buffering.

task_raw.name: JavaScript Node.js event loop tuning
task_raw.description: Identify blocked event loop tasks; move CPU-heavy work off-thread and optimize async boundaries.

task_raw.name: Nginx/Envoy performance hardening
task_raw.description: Tune TLS, HTTP/2/3, buffer sizes, and upstream retries; reduce head-of-line blocking.

task_raw.name: Mobile app start-up optimization
task_raw.description: Trim app initialization, lazy-load modules, and profile JNI/bridge overhead to cut cold start.

task_raw.name: iOS image pipeline speedups
task_raw.description: Downsample, cache, and prefetch images; reduce main-thread work and measure hitching.

task_raw.name: Game engine frame-time stability
task_raw.description: Profile CPU/GPU frame budgets, reduce draw calls, and optimize physics and culling.

task_raw.name: Edge device battery/perf balance
task_raw.description: DVFS tuning and batching strategies; schedule radio/compute windows to save power with SLA.

task_raw.name: Parquet/Arrow pipeline tuning
task_raw.description: Column pruning, predicate pushdown, and compression codecs to shrink I/O and CPU cost.

task_raw.name: Redis/Memcached hot key mitigation
task_raw.description: Detect hot keys, add local caches and TTL jitter; shard and pipeline to lower tail latencies.

task_raw.name: gRPC + TLS zero-copy
task_raw.description: Enable zero-copy receive, reuse buffers, and optimize TLS session resumption for low-latency RPC.

task_raw.name: NumPy/SciPy BLAS selection
task_raw.description: Benchmark MKL/OpenBLAS/BLIS and thread counts; pin to optimal library for target hardware.

task_raw.name: CUDA kernel occupancy tuning
task_raw.description: Adjust grid/block sizes, shared memory, and register pressure; use Nsight metrics to reach target occupancy.

task_raw.name: ONNX graph pruning and constant folding
task_raw.description: Remove dead branches and precompute constants to reduce inference path length.

task_raw.name: JIT/PGO compilation pipeline
task_raw.description: Apply profile-guided optimizations and LTO; keep hot code in L1/ITLB and reduce branch mispredicts.

task_raw.name: gVisor/Firecracker overhead reduction
task_raw.description: Evaluate isolation options and tune syscalls and I/O to minimize sandbox overhead.

task_raw.name: WebRTC low-latency tuning
task_raw.description: Optimize bitrate adaptation, jitter buffer, and ICE/TURN preferences for real-time calls.

task_raw.name: Image/video transcoding throughput
task_raw.description: Pick codecs and presets; pipeline hardware encode/decode and tune GOP for speed.

task_raw.name: S3/GCS I/O parallelism
task_raw.description: Multipart uploads/downloads with tuned part sizes; parallel prefetch and retry backoff.

task_raw.name: TLS handshake offload
task_raw.description: Enable session tickets and 0‑RTT carefully; reduce handshake CPU with hardware crypto where safe.

task_raw.name: GC-safe data structure refactor
task_raw.description: Replace object-heavy patterns with structs/arrays; reduce allocation rate and GC pressure.

task_raw.name: pandas→Polars migration
task_raw.description: Migrate heavy analytics to Polars; exploit lazy queries and parallel execution.

task_raw.name: Query hinting for OLAP cubes
task_raw.description: Apply query hints/rollups and materialized views; schedule re-aggregation windows.

task_raw.name: Elasticsearch indexing throughput
task_raw.description: Tune bulk sizes, refresh intervals, and segment merges; optimize analyzers and mappings.

task_raw.name: Meilisearch/Opensearch relevance + speed
task_raw.description: Balance BM25 parameters and typo tolerance with index memory/CPU budget.

task_raw.name: CI pipeline acceleration
task_raw.description: Cache dependencies, parallelize stages, and use incremental builds; flaky test triage.

task_raw.name: C# async/await hotpath fixes
task_raw.description: Minimize allocations/closures; configure ValueTask and pooling for high-throughput handlers.

task_raw.name: Kotlin coroutines throughput
task_raw.description: Tune dispatchers, structured concurrency, and flow buffering under backpressure.

task_raw.name: Thread pool & queue sizing
task_raw.description: Right-size worker pools and queues; measure queuing delay vs. CPU utilization.

task_raw.name: Autoscaler warm-up for spiky load
task_raw.description: Predictive scaling and pre-warming; reduce cold start penalties for serverless/functions.
